name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Aura Memory
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

```python
from aura import Aura

brain = Aura("./test_brain")
# Steps to reproduce...
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages / tracebacks if any.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 10, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)
- **Python version:** (e.g., 3.12)
- **aura-memory version:** (e.g., 1.2.1)
- **Install method:** pip / maturin develop / source

## Additional Context

Any other context (screenshots, related issues, etc.)
